Localization.Description: Audit service errors occurred while working with a disk

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The audit service is suspending logging on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
The audit service is halting the system on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
There is not enough free disk space for the audit service to write logs on host {event_src.host}
The audit service is switching the system to the single-user mode on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
